name: ktlyst-extract
description: Drop a threat advisory PDF, get structured source-grounded intel. BYOK web app mirroring the interview-coach capability pattern (LLM proposes, deterministic grounding is truth).

scripts.test: node --test app/lib/grounding.test.mjs app/lib/context.test.mjs app/lib/sigmaTemplate.test.mjs app/lib/ruleTranscribe.test.mjs app/lib/iocExtract.test.mjs app/lib/entities.test.mjs app/lib/attackIds.test.mjs app/lib/extractLoop.test.mjs
